text.title: Agent Drafts Spec Before Coding Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping ticket-shape signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: skip — methodology only applies to agent-owned tickets
bypass spec gate; agent may code immediately
post three-section spec comment first; wait for explicit approval

example.trace: agent_assigned=true → auto_approve=false → trivial_scope=false → spec-comment-first → agent posts spec, waits for thumbs-up

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
